input.prompt:
My .NET MAUI Shell app has these problems:
1. GoToAsync("productdetails") throws an exception
2. GoToAsync("//products/active") navigates but nothing visible changes
3. My app takes 3 seconds to start and I have 12 pages in Shell
What's likely wrong in each case and how do I fix them?

input.initialPrompt:
My .NET MAUI Shell app has these problems:
1. GoToAsync("productdetails") throws an exception
2. GoToAsync("//products/active") navigates but nothing visible changes
3. My app takes 3 seconds to start and I have 12 pages in Shell
What's likely wrong in each case and how do I fix them?

data.content:
Here's what's likely wrong and the fix for each:

**1. `GoToAsync("productdetails")` throws**

The route isn't registered. Non-visual (detail) routes must be explicitly registered:

```csharp
// In AppShell constructor or MauiProgram
Routing.RegisterRoute("productdetails", typeof(ProductDetailsPage));
```

Then navigate with:
```csharp
await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("productdetails");
```

Routes defined in XAML (`ShellContent.Route`) are for the visual hierarchy only — pushing onto the stack requires `RegisterRoute`.

---

**2. `GoToAsync("//products/active")` navigates but nothing renders**

The absolute route (`//`) switches tabs/items, but if the `ShellContent` has its `ContentTemplate` pointing to the wrong page — or more commonly — **two `ShellContent` items share the same `Route` value**, Shell resolves the route ambiguously and may land on a blank page.

Check your XAML:
```xml
<!-- Ensure routes are unique and match the URI segments -->
<FlyoutItem Route="products">
    <Tab>
        <ShellContent Route="active"  Title="Active"
                      ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:ActiveProductsPage}" />
        <ShellContent Route="archived" Title="Archived"
                      ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:ArchivedProductsPage}" />
    </Tab>
</FlyoutItem>
```

Also verify you're using `ContentTemplate` (a `DataTemplate`) and not `Content` directly — the latter can silently fail.

---

**3. 3-second startup with 12 pages**

Shell creates every page's `ShellContent` eagerly if you set the `Content` property directly. Use **`ContentTemplate`** so pages are created lazily (only when navigated to):

```xml
<!-- ❌ Eager — page constructed at startup -->
<ShellContent Route="settings" Content="{x:Static local:SettingsPage}" />

<!-- ✅ Lazy — page constructed on first navigation -->
<ShellContent Route="settings"
              ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:SettingsPage}" />
```

Do this for all 12 pages. Additionally, keep heavy work out of page constructors — defer it to `OnAppearing` or use async initialization in your view-models.
data.reasoningText: The user is asking about three common .NET MAUI Shell navigation issues. These are well-known patterns — I can answer from knowledge without needing to search a codebase.
